evals.prompt: 请分析中证白酒指数和跟踪它的白酒 ETF/LOF，现在是否值得纳入观察。要求使用 PE、PB、ROE、估值分位、成分股质量、行业周期和风险框架，不要只给一句长期看好。
evals.expected_output: 应产出 ETF/指数报告，包含数据日期、估值和质量、周期、风险、情景和观察条件，并明确区分事实、假设和缺失数据。
assertions: Report states data date/source or explicitly marks live-data gaps.
Report covers PE, PB, ROE, valuation percentile, historical PE/PB/ROE windows when available, and index/ETF identity.
Report includes a scorecard with category scores, deductions, and any hard vetoes.
Report evaluates constituent quality, industry cycle, and concentration rather than only recent performance.
Report includes value/growth/cycle trap risks, explicit decision preconditions, and margin-of-safety or watchpoint conditions.

evals.prompt: 我想比较沪深300ETF和中证500ETF，哪个更符合价值投资视角？请用统一的数据口径说明估值、ROE、股息率、成分结构、周期位置和安全边际。
evals.expected_output: 应产出两个 ETF/指数的对比报告，说明每个来源的字段含义、数据来源和日期，比较估值/质量/风险，并避免根据近期涨跌直接下结论。
assertions: Report compares both assets with clearly labeled source-specific fields rather than forcing one provider schema.
Report states data date/source or explicitly marks live-data gaps.
Report scores both ETFs or indices with the same category weights and explains deductions.
Report covers valuation, ROE, dividend yield, constituent structure, cycle position, and safety margin.
Report avoids deciding solely from recent performance and gives conditional conclusion, decision preconditions, and watchpoints.

evals.prompt: 按《投资中最简单的事》的框架分析一下 600519 贵州茅台：为什么便宜或贵，为什么好，为什么现在值得或不值得考虑？请特别检查增长陷阱、现金流、定价权和估值。
evals.expected_output: 应产出股票个股报告，回答三个基本问题，覆盖商业模式、护城河、财务质量、估值、时机、风险陷阱和可证伪观察点。
assertions: Report answers why cheap/expensive, why good/bad, and why now.
Report states data date/source or explicitly marks live-data gaps.
Report includes a stock scorecard with category scores, deductions, and any hard vetoes.
Report covers cash flow, pricing power, valuation, and financial quality.
Report checks growth trap/value trap/reflexivity risks, decision preconditions, margin of safety, and thesis invalidation watchpoints.

evals.prompt: 请收集 000001 平安银行最近半年的公告、投资者关系记录、东方财富个股新闻和个股研报，并说明哪些信息能作为事实依据，哪些只能作为市场预期或情绪线索。
evals.expected_output: 应调用或引用合并的数据脚本，区分巨潮公告/调研与东方财富资讯/研报，保留来源、日期、链接和缺失数据，并把公告事实、公司表述、新闻线索、卖方预期分开使用。
assertions: Report uses or explicitly references the stock-disclosure-news-report-data script for CNInfo and Eastmoney event data.
Report separates official CNInfo announcements from investor-relation records, Eastmoney news, and Eastmoney research reports.
Report preserves source, date, title, and URL/PDF link fields or marks unavailable fields explicitly.
Report treats news and research reports as secondary evidence and requires official filing verification for material claims.
Report includes data gaps, source errors, or provider blocking notes instead of inferring missing facts.
